description: Configure a notification profile in ManageEngine OpManager for critical device alerts. The application is already open and logged in on the dashboard (credentials: admin/Admin@123 if re-login is needed). Navigate to Settings > Notifications > Notification Profiles, and create a new notification profile named 'Critical Device Alert'. Configure it to trigger when any device reaches 'Critical' severity. Set the notification type to email with recipient address 'ops-team@company.com'. This creates a real alerting workflow for network infrastructure monitoring.
